# [PKT-PRV-055](task-0122): Provider Data Catalog

## Purpose

Implement provider data catalog.

## Scope

- Catalog format
- Indexing
- Search

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Add indexing
3. Add search

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Indexed
3. Searchable
